meta.name: SPANE Scale of Positive and Negative Experience
meta.fullName: Scale of Positive and Negative Experience
meta.description: The SPANE is a 12-item measure of subjective well-being that assesses positive and negative feelings experienced over the past four weeks. It provides separate scores for positive experiences, negative experiences, and an overall affect balance.
meta.author: Diener, Wirtz, Tov, Kim-Prieto, Choi, Oishi & Biswas-Diener (2010)
meta.reference: Diener E, Wirtz D, Tov W, Kim-Prieto C, Choi D, Oishi S, Biswas-Diener R. New well-being measures: Short scales to assess flourishing and positive and negative feelings. Social Indicators Research. 2010;97(2):143-156.
meta.instruction: Please think about what you have been doing and experiencing during the past four weeks. Then report how much you experienced each of the following feelings, using the scale below.

ranges.label: Low Well-Being
ranges.description: Your overall emotional experience suggests low well-being. Negative feelings may be dominating your daily experience. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Consider speaking with a mental health professional
Try to engage in activities that bring you joy or satisfaction
Reach out to supportive friends or family members
Practice small daily acts of self-care
Try doing one fulfilling activity each day

ranges.label: Below Average Well-Being
ranges.description: Your emotional experience is below average. You may be experiencing more negative feelings than positive ones. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Identify activities and situations that boost your positive emotions
Consider stress management techniques such as mindfulness or exercise
Monitor your emotional patterns over time
If feelings persist, consider consulting a counselor
Increase the frequency of positive social activities

ranges.label: Above Average Well-Being
ranges.description: Your emotional experience is above average, indicating a generally positive outlook with a good balance of feelings. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue engaging in activities that bring positive experiences
Maintain your social connections and supportive relationships
Practice gratitude to reinforce positive emotional patterns
Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others

ranges.label: High Well-Being
ranges.description: Your emotional experience indicates high well-being. You frequently experience positive feelings and rarely experience negative ones. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up your healthy lifestyle and coping strategies
Share your positivity with others
Continue to nurture the relationships and activities that support your well-being
Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others

positive.label: Low Positive Feelings
positive.description: You rarely experience positive emotions. Consider seeking ways to introduce more enjoyable activities into your life. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

positive.label: Moderate Positive Feelings
positive.description: You sometimes experience positive emotions but there is room for improvement. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

positive.label: High Positive Feelings
positive.description: You frequently experience positive emotions, indicating good emotional health. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Increase the frequency of positive social activities
Develop a hobby that gives you a sense of accomplishment
Focus on your strengths and existing resources
Set meaningful personal goals
Maintain regular exercise and outdoor activities

positive.label: Very High Positive Feelings
positive.description: You very frequently experience positive emotions, reflecting excellent emotional well-being. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

negative.label: Low Negative Feelings
negative.description: You rarely experience negative emotions, indicating good emotional health. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

negative.label: Moderate Negative Feelings
negative.description: You sometimes experience negative emotions, which is within the normal range. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Increase the frequency of positive social activities
Develop a hobby that gives you a sense of accomplishment
Focus on your strengths and existing resources
Set meaningful personal goals
Maintain regular exercise and outdoor activities

negative.label: High Negative Feelings
negative.description: You frequently experience negative emotions. Consider strategies to manage stress and difficult feelings. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Increase the frequency of positive social activities
Develop a hobby that gives you a sense of accomplishment
Focus on your strengths and existing resources
Set meaningful personal goals
Maintain regular exercise and outdoor activities

negative.label: Very High Negative Feelings
negative.description: You very frequently experience negative emotions. Professional support is recommended. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional
